Woohoo! You’ve Just Won FREE Chocolate for a FULL Month!


Congratulations, You’re officially a Plaayer! Here’s how to claim your prize:

1. Visit us at Salt, Kite Beach and pick your favourite flavours

2. ⁠Enjoy a personalized box curated just for you every week

3. ⁠Indulge in clean, mindful chocolates delivered straight to your doorstep!

Keep Plaayin!
